dashboard.subtitle: Manage your investments and track your income
dashboard.referral.title: Invite and earn
dashboard.referral.subtitle: Share your link and earn together
invite.title: Invite friends
invite.subtitle: Share your link and earn with the referral program
invite.linkDescription: Share the link with friends so they can register through your invitation
invite.scanQR: Scan the QR code to follow the link
invite.howItWorksDesc: The referral program is a separate reward system for invited members. Here's how your income is generated:
invite.flowCircleDesc: When any member of your team (up to 5 levels deep) closes a circle on their workspace, a referral share is allocated from the first payment ($10)
invite.flowSplitTitle: The share is split equally across 5 levels
invite.flowSplitDesc: The referral portion is automatically divided into 5 equal parts — one for each level up the invitation tree
invite.flowEarnDesc: Regardless of which line the member is on (1–5), your share is the same — 1/5 of the referral portion from each circle
invite.exampleText: A member with a $500 lot completes a circle. From the $10, $0.80 goes to referrals. This is split into 5 equal parts: each level receives $0.16 per circle. A $500 lot has 15 workspaces, each going through ~12 circles. The more team members you have — the more payouts you receive.
invite.levelsSubtitle: Each level receives an equal share — 20% (1/5) of the referral portion
invite.level2Desc: Those invited by your direct referrals
invite.level5Desc: Invited by level 4 members — maximum depth
invite.deductionDesc: Each time referral income is credited, a portion of the amount is automatically converted into technical lots. The deduction percentage depends on the total referral earnings accumulated over all time.
invite.deductionStep1: You receive a referral payout for a member's circle
invite.deductionStep2: The system determines the deduction percentage based on your total lifetime referral earnings
invite.deductionStep3: Part of the payout is automatically converted to technical lots, the rest is credited to your referral balance
invite.deductionNote: The higher your total lifetime referral earnings — the higher the deduction percentage for technical lots. Exact thresholds and percentages are determined automatically by the system.
invite.referralNote: Earnings go to the referral balance. To withdraw: transfer funds from the referral balance to the income balance, then withdraw.
invite.noLotNote: You must have at least one active lot to receive referral payouts. If you have no active lot — undistributed funds are converted to technical lots.
